name: chr17_centromere
description: Chromosome 17 centromere/pericentromere (acen band interval). Alpha-satellite higher-order repeat (HOR) array: D17Z1 (~16-monomer HOR, classical 2.7 kb); SF3. Flanked by pericentric HSat2/HSat3 satellite blocks. GRCh38 represents this region only as a placeholder gap interval filled with model alpha-satellite; fully sequence-resolved only in T2T-CHM13.
expected_copy_count: thousands of 171 bp alpha-satellite monomers organised into HOR units (~1-6 kb each), tandemly arrayed
